g.text: OCI NAT Gateway Reconcile State Machine
read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- The current formal notes remain lifecycle-centric even
though blockTraffic now participates in the supported
- Confirm deletion with follow-up GetNatGateway calls until
the resource is gone or not found.
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
OCI deletion is confirmed and the finalizer can be removed
